articles.title: LAKR climb to fourth after Powell takes Super Kings apart
articles.description: Saiteja Mukkamalla's 80 set up a strong total for Texas Super Kings, but Rovman Powell's onslaught was too much for them to handle

articles.title: West Indies hope new ball brings change of luck after Udara bosses first day
articles.description: "This is my third chance in Tests, so I thought I want to go big. I made it, so I'm really happy about that," Lahiru Udara says after scoring his first Test century

articles.title: Lahiru Udara 188 carries the fight for Sri Lanka
articles.description: Record stand with Kamindu Mendis puts visitors in commanding position despite late West Indies strikes

articles.title: Harmer and Cook help Essex hand out Hove thrashing
articles.description: Eagles captain hits 46 off 17 balls to boost total before claiming two wickets and effecting a run-out

articles.title: Stone holds nerve as Notts seal one-run win to stay top
articles.description: Munsey continues hot streak with fifth half-century in six before Lancashire mess up run chase

articles.title: Smale trail plots path for Glamorgan to win again
articles.description: Sam Hain hits 63 not out from 46 but Warwickshire unable to knock home side off course in chase

articles.title: Bairstow, Moeen gun down Durham as Yorkshire close on knockouts
articles.description: Durham get off to flyer thanks to Alex Lees' 73 off 35 before stumbling, unable to defend 205-9

articles.title: Johnson flattens Lancashire to keep Durham's Finals Day hopes alive
articles.description: Lancashire officially eliminated after sliding to 79 all out at Chester-le-Street

articles.title: Hose, Raza get Rapids flowing before Kent collapse
articles.description: Visitors blown away for 59 with Allison, Raza and Mir all taking two apiece

articles.title: Dawkins hundred, Flintoff 79* as England U19s level series
articles.description: Unbroken 191-run partnership sees South Africa comfortably overhauled

articles.title: Who has most T20I wickets for India on English soil?
articles.description: India take on England in a five-match away T20I series, of which the first T20I has been completed on July 1, unfortunately yielding no result due to a washout.

articles.title: US Bankruptcy Court approves USA Cricket-ACE settlement, clearing path to Chapter 11 exit
articles.description: The deal unlocks more than $1.1 million in funding and restores ACE as USA Cricket's commercial partner as the governing body eyes a return from ICC suspension.

articles.title: The Hundred Women’s 2026: Welsh Fire announce Sophie Devine as captain
articles.description: Devine will now be tasked with leading a side filled with quality T20 players, including Freya Kemp, Em Arlott, Sarah Bryce and Georgia Wareham, to name a few.

articles.title: MLC 2026: Match 20, LAS vs NY Match Prediction – Who will win today’s MLC match between Los Angeles Knight Riders vs MI New York?
articles.description: Los Angeles Knight Riders (LAS) face off against MI New York (NY) in match No. 20 of the ongoing Major League Cricket (MLC) 2026 at the Knight Riders Cricket Field in Pomona on Sunday, July 5.

articles.title: MLC 2026: Match 19, WAS vs SF Match Prediction – Who will win today’s MLC match between Washington Freedom vs San Francisco Unicorns?
articles.description: Washington Freedom (WAS) will take on San Francisco Unicorns (SFU) in match No. 19 of the ongoing Major League Cricket (MLC). This match will be played at the Knight Riders Cricket Field in Pomona.

articles.title: ‘You just lose and you learn’ - Mandla Mashimbyi vows South Africa will rebuild after Women’s T20 World Cup semi-final exit
articles.description: SA were restricted to 129 chasing 170 as Nat Sciver-Brunt and Heather Knight’s 133-run stand proved the turning point at The Oval.

articles.description: Both sides come into the game in different sections of the points table.

articles.title: 'As a player, Shreyas Iyer doesn't have to worry about anything' - Parthiv Patel shares views on Indian T20I captain's talent before 2nd T20I
articles.description: "Those raising questions over Shreyas Iyer would have felt a lot more relieved after this innings," Parthiv Patel said while referring to the Mumbai batter's solid half-century in the first T20I.

articles.title: 'Can he play out five maiden overs?' - Kapil Dev’s bold remark on Vaibhav Suryavanshi ahead of ENG vs IND 2026 2nd T20I
articles.description: Kapil Dev urged the Indian team management to hand Vaibhav Sooryavanshi his international debut if they feel he is ready, rather than keep him waiting just because of his young age.
